Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "localisation_code" ; FAT Title Alt::Original localisation code ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; FAT Title Alt::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "localised_version" ; "false" ) & SetProperty ( "caller" ; "fat_user" ) & SetProperty ( "user_id" ; User @ User::User_id ) & SetProperty ( "portal" ; "owned_titles" )

SetProperty ( "localisation_code" ; FAT Title Alt::ChooseLocalisationCode ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; FAT Title Alt::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "localised_version" ; "true" ) & SetProperty ( "caller" ; "fat_user" ) & SetProperty ( "user_id" ; User @ User::User_id ) & SetProperty ( "portal" ; "owned_titles" )

SetProperty ( "localisation_code" ; FAT Title All titles::Original localisation code ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; FAT Title All titles::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "localised_version" ; "false" ) & SetProperty ( "caller" ; "fat_user" ) & SetProperty ( "user_id" ; User @ User::User_id ) & SetProperty ( "portal" ; "all_titles" )

SetProperty ( "localisation_code" ; FAT Title All titles::ChooseLocalisationCode ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; FAT Title All titles::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "localised_version" ; "true" ) & SetProperty ( "caller" ; "fat_user" ) & SetProperty ( "user_id" ; User @ User::User_id ) & SetProperty ( "portal" ; "all_titles" )
